# Wire — Pipe — distributed-lock

> **Feature delivered — acceptance criteria.** Generated from the as-built BDD tests in
> [`test/stories/wire_pipe_distributed_lock_story_test.exs`](../../../echo/apps/echo_mq/test/stories/wire_pipe_distributed_lock_story_test.exs). Every scenario below is a passing
> ExUnit test driving the real `EchoMQ` surface against Valkey, so the catalogue cannot
> drift from the code.

**1 scenario.**

## Scenario: the first SET NX takes the lock, the second is refused, and releasing reopens it

- **Given** a free lock key
- **When** two contenders each attempt SET NX with a 30s TTL in one pipe, then the holder releases
- **Then** the first acquires (OK), the second is refused (nil), release deletes one key, and reacquire succeeds
